records.question: Which county public safety units have the police force Central Saanich Police, serve Canóvanas where the Hispanic population is exactly 99.2, the Asian population is at most 0.2, the White population is at most 61.2, and have no more than 21 police officers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.county_id FROM county_public_safety
JOIN city ON county_public_safety.county_id = city.county_id
WHERE city.asian <= 0.2 AND city.name = 'Canóvanas' AND county_public_safety.police_force = 'Central Saanich Police' AND city.white <= 61.2 AND city.hispanic = 99.2 AND county_public_safety.police_officers <= 21
records.pred_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.County_ID
FROM county_public_safety
JOIN city ON county_public_safety.County_ID = city.County_ID
WHERE county_public_safety.Police_force = 'Central Saanich Police'
  AND city.Name = 'Canóvanas'
  AND city.Hispanic = 99.2
  AND city.Asian <= 0.2
  AND city.White <= 61.2
  AND county_public_safety.Police_officers <= 21

records.question: Which counties named Abbotsford in the East with a population of 128165 and the Abbotsford Police Department have at least 187 officers, residents per officer at most 685, a crime rate no more than 118.0, and a case burden no more than 81?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.county_id FROM county_public_safety
WHERE county_public_safety.residents_per_officer <= 685 AND county_public_safety.police_officers >= 187 AND county_public_safety.police_force = 'Abbotsford Police Department' AND county_public_safety.location = 'East' AND county_public_safety.crime_rate <= 118.0 AND county_public_safety.population = 128165 AND county_public_safety.case_burden <= 81 AND county_public_safety.name = 'Abbotsford'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.County_ID
FROM county_public_safety
WHERE Name = 'Abbotsford'
  AND Location = 'East'
  AND Population = 128165
  AND Police_force = 'Abbotsford Police Department'
  AND Police_officers >= 187
  AND Residents_per_officer <= 685
  AND Crime_rate <= 118.0
  AND Case_burden <= 81

records.question: Which counties named Abbotsford with the Abbotsford Police Department have a population of at most 128165, a crime rate of at least 118.0, a case burden of at least 81, no more than 187 police officers, and at least 685 residents per officer?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT county_public_safety.county_id FROM county_public_safety
WHERE county_public_safety.population <= 128165 AND county_public_safety.crime_rate >= 118.0 AND county_public_safety.case_burden >= 81 AND county_public_safety.police_officers <= 187 AND county_public_safety.name = 'Abbotsford' AND county_public_safety.residents_per_officer >= 685 AND county_public_safety.police_force = 'Abbotsford Police Department'
